name: brick-break
description: Breakout-inspirerat arkadspel i vanilla JavaScript med pixelkonst-estetik

scripts.build: npx esbuild brick-break.js --bundle --minify --format=iife --global-name=BrickBreak --outfile=dist/game.js && npx esbuild brick-break.css --minify --outfile=dist/game.css && npx javascript-obfuscator dist/game.js --output dist/game.js --compact true --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --rename-globals false --string-array true --string-array-calls-transform true --string-array-encoding base64 --self-defending true

author: christer.holm@nordic.one
